items.reason: Stage81 renders 30 scenes for endurance; it does not yet produce 3 full broadcast episodes as final manuscripts.
Stage76 restores 532-scene planning metadata. Actual rendering at that scale is outside Stage81.1 scope.
Stage82 must compare V1700 against pure GPT and external baselines.
Commercial declaration needs user-facing package, sample episodes, quality reports, and blind benchmark evidence.
